chapters.en: And God met Balaam: and he said unto him, I have prepared seven altars, and I have offered upon altar a bullock and a ram.

chapters.zh: 耶和华将话传给巴兰，又说：你回到巴勒那里，要如此如此说。
chapters.en: And the LORD put a word in Balaam's mouth, and said, Return unto Balak, and thus thou shalt speak.

chapters.zh: 他就回到巴勒那里，见他同摩押的使臣都站在燔祭旁边。
chapters.en: And he returned unto him, and, lo, he stood by his burnt sacrifice, he, and all the princes of Moab.

chapters.zh: 巴兰便题起诗歌说：巴勒引我出亚兰，摩押王引我出东山，说：来阿，为我咒诅雅各；来阿，怒骂以色列。
chapters.en: And he took up his parable, and said, Balak the king of Moab hath brought me from Aram, out of the mountains of the east, , Come, curse me Jacob, and come, defy Israel.

chapters.zh: 神没有咒诅的，我焉能咒诅？耶和华没有怒骂的，我焉能怒骂？
chapters.en: How shall I curse, whom God hath not cursed? or how shall I defy, the LORD hath not defied?

chapters.zh: 我从高峰看他，从小山望他；这是独居的民，不列在万民中。
chapters.en: For from the top of the rocks I see him, and from the hills I behold him: lo, the people shall dwell alone, and shall not be reckoned among the nations.

chapters.zh: 谁能数点雅各的尘土？谁能计算以色列的四分之一？我愿如义人之死而死；我愿如义人之终而终。
chapters.en: Who can count the dust of Jacob, and the number of the fourth of Israel? Let me die the death of the righteous, and let my last end be like his!

chapters.zh: 巴勒对巴兰说：你向我做的是甚么事呢？我领你来咒诅我的仇敌，不料，你竟为他们祝福。
chapters.en: And Balak said unto Balaam, What hast thou done unto me? I took thee to curse mine enemies, and, behold, thou hast blessed altogether.

chapters.zh: 他回答说：耶和华传给我的话，我能不谨慎传说么？
chapters.en: And he answered and said, Must I not take heed to speak that which the LORD hath put in my mouth?

chapters.zh: 巴勒说：求你同我往别处去，在那里可以看见他们；你不能全看见，只能看见他们边界上的人。在那里要为我咒诅他们。
chapters.en: And Balak said unto him, Come, I pray thee, with me unto another place, from whence thou mayest see them: thou shalt see but the utmost part of them, and shalt not see them all: and curse me them from thence.

chapters.zh: 于是领巴兰到了琐腓田，上了毘斯迦山顶，筑了七座坛；每座坛上献一只公牛，一只公羊。
chapters.en: And he brought him into the field of Zophim, to the top of Pisgah, and built seven altars, and offered a bullock and a ram on altar.

chapters.zh: 巴兰对巴勒说：你站在这燔祭旁边，等我往那边去迎见耶和华。
chapters.en: And he said unto Balak, Stand here by thy burnt offering, while I meet yonder.

chapters.zh: 耶和华临到巴兰那里，将话传给他；又说：你回到巴勒那里，要如此如此说。
chapters.en: And the LORD met Balaam, and put a word in his mouth, and said, Go again unto Balak, and say thus.

chapters.zh: 他就回到巴勒那里，见他站在燔祭旁边；摩押的使臣也和他在一处。巴勒问他说：耶和华说了甚么话呢？
chapters.en: And when he came to him, behold, he stood by his burnt offering, and the princes of Moab with him. And Balak said unto him, What hath the LORD spoken?

chapters.zh: 巴兰就题诗歌说：巴勒，你起来听；西拨的儿子，你听我言。
chapters.en: And he took up his parable, and said, Rise up, Balak, and hear; hearken unto me, thou son of Zippor:

chapters.zh: 神非人，必不致说谎，也非人子，必不致后悔。他说话岂不照著行呢？他发言岂不要成就呢？
chapters.en: God not a man, that he should lie; neither the son of man, that he should repent: hath he said, and shall he not do ? or hath he spoken, and shall he not make it good?

chapters.zh: 我奉命祝福；神也曾赐福，此事我不能翻转。
chapters.en: Behold, I have received to bless: and he hath blessed; and I cannot reverse it.

chapters.zh: 他未见雅各中有罪孽，也未见以色列中有奸恶。耶和华 ─ 他的神和他同在；有欢呼王的声音在他们中间。
chapters.en: He hath not beheld iniquity in Jacob, neither hath he seen perverseness in Israel: the LORD his God with him, and the shout of a king among them.

chapters.zh: 神领他们出埃及；他们似乎有野牛之力。
chapters.en: God brought them out of Egypt; he hath as it were the strength of an unicorn.

chapters.zh: 断没有法术可以害雅各，也没有占卜可以害以色列。现在必有人论及雅各，就是论及以色列说：神为他行了何等的大事！
chapters.en: Surely no enchantment against Jacob, neither any divination against Israel: according to this time it shall be said of Jacob and of Israel, What hath God wrought!

chapters.zh: 这民起来，彷佛母狮，挺身，好像公狮，未曾吃野食，未曾喝被伤者之血，决不躺卧。
chapters.en: Behold, the people shall rise up as a great lion, and lift up himself as a young lion: he shall not lie down until he eat the prey, and drink the blood of the slain.

chapters.zh: 巴勒对巴兰说：你一点不要咒诅他们，也不要为他们祝福。
chapters.en: And Balak said unto Balaam, Neither curse them at all, nor bless them at all.

chapters.zh: 巴兰回答巴勒说：我岂不是告诉你说凡耶和华所说的，我必须遵行么？
chapters.en: But Balaam answered and said unto Balak, Told not I thee, saying, All that the LORD speaketh, that I must do?

chapters.zh: 巴勒对巴兰说：来罢，我领你往别处去，或者神喜欢你在那里为我咒诅他们。
chapters.en: And Balak said unto Balaam, Come, I pray thee, I will bring thee unto another place; peradventure it will please God that thou mayest curse me them from thence.

chapters.zh: 巴勒就领巴兰到那下望旷野的毘珥山顶上。
chapters.en: And Balak brought Balaam unto the top of Peor, that looketh toward Jeshimon.

chapters.zh: 巴兰对巴勒说：你在这里为我筑七座坛，又在这里为我豫备七只公牛，七只公羊。
chapters.en: And Balaam said unto Balak, Build me here seven altars, and prepare me here seven bullocks and seven rams.

chapters.zh: 巴勒就照巴兰的话行，在每座坛上献一只公牛，一只公羊。
chapters.en: And Balak did as Balaam had said, and offered a bullock and a ram on altar.

chapters.zh: 巴兰见耶和华喜欢赐福与以色列，就不像前两次去求法术，却面向旷野。
chapters.en: And when Balaam saw that it pleased the LORD to bless Israel, he went not, as at other times, to seek for enchantments, but he set his face toward the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 巴兰举目，看见以色列人照著支派居住。神的灵就临到他身上，
chapters.en: And Balaam lifted up his eyes, and he saw Israel abiding according to their tribes; and the spirit of God came upon him.

chapters.zh: 他便题起诗歌说：比珥的儿子巴兰说，眼目闭住的人说，（闭住或作：睁开）
chapters.en: And he took up his parable, and said, Balaam the son of Beor hath said, and the man whose eyes are open hath said:

chapters.zh: 得听神的言语，得见全能者的异象，眼目睁开而仆倒的人说：
chapters.en: He hath said, which heard the words of God, which saw the vision of the Almighty, falling , but having his eyes open:

chapters.zh: 雅各阿，你的帐棚何等华美！以色列阿，你的帐幕何其华丽！
chapters.en: How goodly are thy tents, O Jacob, thy tabernacles, O Israel!

chapters.zh: 如接连的山谷，如河旁的园子，如耶和华所栽的沉香树，如水边的香柏木。
chapters.en: As the valleys are they spread forth, as gardens by the river's side, as the trees of lign aloes which the LORD hath planted, as cedar trees beside the waters.

chapters.zh: 水要从他的桶里流出；种子要撒在多水之处。他的王必超过亚甲；他的国必要振兴。
chapters.en: He shall pour the water out of his buckets, and his seed in many waters, and his king shall be higher than Agag, and his kingdom shall be exalted.

chapters.zh: 神领他出埃及；他似乎有野牛之力。他要吞吃敌国，折断他们的骨头，用箭射透他们。
chapters.en: God brought him forth out of Egypt; he hath as it were the strength of an unicorn: he shall eat up the nations his enemies, and shall break their bones, and pierce through with his arrows.

chapters.zh: 他蹲如公狮，卧如母狮，谁敢惹他？凡给你祝福的，愿他蒙福；凡咒诅你的，愿他受咒诅。
chapters.en: He couched, he lay down as a lion, and as a great lion: who shall stir him up? Blessed he that blesseth thee, and cursed he that curseth thee.

chapters.zh: 巴勒向巴兰生气，就拍起手来，对巴兰说：我召你来为我咒诅仇敌，不料，你这三次竟为他们祝福。
chapters.en: And Balak's anger was kindled against Balaam, and he smote his hands together: and Balak said unto Balaam, I called thee to curse mine enemies, and, behold, thou hast altogether blessed these three times.

chapters.zh: 如今你快回本地去罢！我想使你得大尊荣，耶和华却阻止你不得尊荣。
chapters.en: Therefore now flee thou to thy place: I thought to promote thee unto great honour; but, lo, the LORD hath kept thee back from honour.

chapters.zh: 巴兰对巴勒说：我岂不是对你所差遣到我那里的使者说：
chapters.en: And Balaam said unto Balak, Spake I not also to thy messengers which thou sentest unto me, saying,

chapters.zh: 巴勒就是将他满屋的金银给我，我也不得越过耶和华的命，凭自己的心意行好行歹。耶和华说甚么，我就要说甚么？
chapters.en: If Balak would give me his house full of silver and gold, I cannot go beyond the commandment of the LORD, to do good or bad of mine own mind; what the LORD saith, that will I speak?

chapters.zh: 现在我要回本族去。你来，我告诉你这民日后要怎样待你的民。
chapters.en: And now, behold, I go unto my people: come I will advertise thee what this people shall do to thy people in the latter days.

chapters.zh: 他就题起诗歌说：比珥的儿子巴兰说：眼目闭住的人说，（闭住或作：睁开）
chapters.en: And he took up his parable, and said, Balaam the son of Beor hath said, and the man whose eyes are open hath said:

chapters.zh: 得听神的言语，明白至高者的意旨，看见全能者的异象，眼目睁开而仆倒的人说：
chapters.en: He hath said, which heard the words of God, and knew the knowledge of the most High, saw the vision of the Almighty, falling , but having his eyes open:

chapters.zh: 我看他却不在现时；我望他却不在近日。有星要出于雅各，有杖要兴于以色列，必打破摩押的四角，毁坏扰乱 . 之子。
chapters.en: I shall see him, but not now: I shall behold him, but not nigh: there shall come a Star out of Jacob, and a Sceptre shall rise out of Israel, and shall smite the corners of Moab, and destroy all the children of Sheth.

chapters.zh: 他必得以东为基业，又得仇敌之地西珥为产业；以色列必行事勇敢。
chapters.en: And Edom shall be a possession, Seir also shall be a possession for his enemies; and Israel shall do valiantly.

chapters.zh: 有一位出于雅各的，必掌大权；他要除灭城中的余民。
chapters.en: Out of Jacob shall come he that shall have dominion, and shall destroy him that remaineth of the city.

chapters.zh: 巴兰观看亚玛力，就题起诗歌说：亚玛力原为诸国之首，但他终必沉沦。
chapters.en: And when he looked on Amalek, he took up his parable, and said, Amalek the first of the nations; but his latter end that he perish for ever.

chapters.zh: 巴兰观看基尼人，就题起诗歌说：你的住处本是坚固；你的窝巢做在岩穴中。
chapters.en: And he looked on the Kenites, and took up his parable, and said, Strong is thy dwellingplace, and thou puttest thy nest in a rock.

chapters.zh: 然而基尼必至衰微，直到亚述把你掳去。
chapters.en: Nevertheless the Kenite shall be wasted, until Asshur shall carry thee away captive.

chapters.zh: 巴兰又题起诗歌说：哀哉！神行这事，谁能得活？
chapters.en: And he took up his parable, and said, Alas, who shall live when God doeth this!

chapters.zh: 必有人乘船从基提界而来，苦害亚述，苦害希伯；他也必至沉沦。
chapters.en: And ships from the coast of Chittim, and shall afflict Asshur, and shall afflict Eber, and he also shall perish for ever.

chapters.zh: 于是巴兰起来，回他本地去；巴勒也回去了。
chapters.en: And Balaam rose up, and went and returned to his place: and Balak also went his way.

chapters.zh: 以色列人住在什亭，百姓与摩押女子行起淫乱。
chapters.en: And Israel abode in Shittim, and the people began to commit whoredom with the daughters of Moab.

chapters.zh: 因为这女子叫百姓来，一同给他们的神献祭，百姓就吃他们的祭物，跪拜他们的神。
chapters.en: And they called the people unto the sacrifices of their gods: and the people did eat, and bowed down to their gods.

chapters.zh: 以色列人与巴力毘珥连合，耶和华的怒气就向以色列人发作。
chapters.en: And Israel joined himself unto Baalpeor: and the anger of the LORD was kindled against Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐摩西说：将百姓中所有的族长在我面前对著日头悬挂，使我向以色列人所发的怒气可以消了。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Take all the heads of the people, and hang them up before the LORD against the sun, that the fierce anger of the LORD may be turned away from Israel.

chapters.zh: 于是摩西吩咐以色列的审判官说：凡属你们的人，有与巴力毘珥连合的，你们各人要把他们杀了。
chapters.en: And Moses said unto the judges of Israel, Slay ye every one his men that were joined unto Baalpeor.

chapters.zh: 摩西和以色列全会众正在会幕门前哭泣的时候，谁知，有以色列中的一个人，当他们眼前，带著一个米甸女人到他弟兄那里去。
chapters.en: And, behold, one of the children of Israel came and brought unto his brethren a Midianitish woman in the sight of Moses, and in the sight of all the congregation of the children of Israel, who weeping the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.

chapters.zh: 祭司亚伦的孙子，以利亚撒的儿子非尼哈看见了，就从会中起来，手里拿著枪，
chapters.en: And when Phinehas, the son of Eleazar, the son of Aaron the priest, saw , he rose up from among the congregation, and took a javelin in his hand;

chapters.zh: 跟随那以色列人进亭子里去，便将以色列人和那女人由腹中刺透。这样，在以色列人中瘟疫就止息了。
chapters.en: And he went after the man of Israel into the tent, and thrust both of them through, the man of Israel, and the woman through her belly. So the plague was stayed from the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 那时遭瘟疫死的，有二万四千人。
chapters.en: And those that died in the plague were twenty and four thousand.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 祭司亚伦的孙子，以利亚撒的儿子非尼哈，使我向以色列人所发的怒消了；因他在他们中间，以我的忌邪为心，使我不在忌邪中把他们除灭。
chapters.en: Phinehas, the son of Eleazar, the son of Aaron the priest, hath turned my wrath away from the children of Israel, while he was zealous for my sake among them, that I consumed not the children of Israel in my jealousy.

chapters.zh: 因此，你要说：我将我平安的约赐给他。
chapters.en: Wherefore say, Behold, I give unto him my covenant of peace:

chapters.zh: 这约要给他和他的后裔，作为永远当祭司职任的约；因他为神有忌邪的心，为以色列人赎罪。
chapters.en: And he shall have it, and his seed after him, the covenant of an everlasting priesthood; because he was zealous for his God, and made an atonement for the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 那与米甸女人一同被杀的以色列人，名叫心利，是撒路的儿子，是西缅一个宗族的首领。
chapters.en: Now the name of the Israelite that was slain, that was slain with the Midianitish woman, Zimri, the son of Salu, a prince of a chief house among the Simeonites.

chapters.zh: 那被杀的米甸女人，名叫哥斯比，是苏珥的女儿；这苏珥是米甸 . 一个宗族的首领。
chapters.en: And the name of the Midianitish woman that was slain Cozbi, the daughter of Zur; he head over a people, of a chief house in Midian.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 你要扰害米甸人，击杀他们；
chapters.en: Vex the Midianites, and smite them:

chapters.zh: 因为他们用诡计扰害你们，在毘珥的事上和他们的姊妹、米甸首领的女儿哥斯比的事上，用这诡计诱惑了你们；这哥斯比，当瘟疫流行的日子，因毘珥的事被杀了。
chapters.en: For they vex you with their wiles, wherewith they have beguiled you in the matter of Peor, and in the matter of Cozbi, the daughter of a prince of Midian, their sister, which was slain in the day of the plague for Peor's sake.

chapters.zh: 瘟疫之后，耶和华晓谕摩西和祭司亚伦的儿子以利亚撒说：
chapters.en: And it came to pass after the plague, that the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们要将以色列全会众，按他们的宗族，凡以色列中从二十岁以外、能出去打仗的，计算总数。
chapters.en: Take the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel, from twenty years old and upward, throughout their fathers' house, all that are able to go to war in Israel.

chapters.zh: 摩西和祭司以利亚撒在摩押平原与耶利哥相对的约但河边向以色列人说：
chapters.en: And Moses and Eleazar the priest spake with them in the plains of Moab by Jordan Jericho, saying,

chapters.zh: 将你们中间从二十岁以外的计算总数；是照耶和华吩咐出埃及地的摩西和以色列人的话。
chapters.en: , from twenty years old and upward; as the LORD commanded Moses and the children of Israel, which went forth out of the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 以色列的长子是流便。流便的众子：属哈诺的，有哈诺族；属法路的，有法路族；
chapters.en: Reuben, the eldest son of Israel: the children of Reuben; Hanoch, the family of the Hanochites: of Pallu, the family of the Palluites:

chapters.zh: 属希斯伦的，有希斯伦族；属迦米的，有迦米族；
chapters.en: Of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites: of Carmi, the family of the Carmites.

chapters.zh: 这就是流便的各族；其中被数的，共有四万三千七百三十名。
chapters.en: These the families of the Reubenites: and they that were numbered of them were forty and three thousand and seven hundred and thirty.

chapters.zh: 法路的儿子是以利押。
chapters.en: And the sons of Pallu; Eliab.

chapters.zh: 以利押的众子是尼母利、大坍、亚比兰。这大坍、亚比兰，就是从会中选召的，与可拉一党同向耶和华争闹的时候也向摩西、亚伦争闹；
chapters.en: And the sons of Eliab; Nemuel, and Dathan, and Abiram. This Dathan and Abiram, famous in the congregation, who strove against Moses and against Aaron in the company of Korah, when they strove against the LORD:

chapters.zh: 地便开口吞了他们，和可拉、可拉的党类一同死亡。那时火烧灭了二百五十个人；他们就作了警戒。
chapters.en: And the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up together with Korah, when that company died, what time the fire devoured two hundred and fifty men: and they became a sign.

chapters.zh: 然而可拉的众子没有死亡。
chapters.en: Notwithstanding the children of Korah died not.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，西缅的众子：属尼母利的，有尼母利族；属雅悯的，有雅悯族；属雅斤的，有雅斤族；
chapters.en: The sons of Simeon after their families: of Nemuel, the family of the Nemuelites: of Jamin, the family of the Jaminites: of Jachin, the family of the Jachinites:

chapters.zh: 属谢拉的，有谢拉族；属扫罗的，有扫罗族。
chapters.en: Of Zerah, the family of the Zarhites: of Shaul, the family of the Shaulites.

chapters.zh: 这就是西缅的各族，共有二万二千二百名。
chapters.en: These the families of the Simeonites, twenty and two thousand and two hundred.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，迦得的众子：属洗分的，有洗分族；属哈基的，有哈基族；属书尼的，有书尼族；
chapters.en: The children of Gad after their families: of Zephon, the family of the Zephonites: of Haggi, the family of the Haggites: of Shuni, the family of the Shunites:

chapters.zh: 属阿斯尼的，有阿斯尼族；属以利的，有以利族；
chapters.en: Of Ozni, the family of the Oznites: of Eri, the family of the Erites:

chapters.zh: 属亚律的，有亚律族；属亚列利的，有亚列利族。
chapters.en: Of Arod, the family of the Arodites: of Areli, the family of the Arelites.

chapters.zh: 这就是迦得子孙的各族，照他们中间被数的，共有四万零五百名。
chapters.en: These the families of the children of Gad according to those that were numbered of them, forty thousand and five hundred.

chapters.zh: 犹大的儿子是珥和俄南。这珥和俄南死在迦南地。
chapters.en: The sons of Judah Er and Onan: and Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，犹大其余的众子：属示拉的，有示拉族；属法勒斯的，有法勒斯族；属谢拉的，有谢拉族。
chapters.en: And the sons of Judah after their families were; of Shelah, the family of the Shelanites: of Pharez, the family of the Pharzites: of Zerah, the family of the Zarhites.

chapters.zh: 法勒斯的儿子：属希斯伦的，有希斯伦族；属哈母勒的，有哈母勒族。
chapters.en: And the sons of Pharez were; of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites: of Hamul, the family of the Hamulites.

chapters.zh: 这就是犹大的各族，照他们中间被数的，共有七万六千五百名。
chapters.en: These the families of Judah according to those that were numbered of them, threescore and sixteen thousand and five hundred.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，以萨迦的众子：属陀拉的，有陀拉族；属普瓦的，有普瓦族；
chapters.en: the sons of Issachar after their families: Tola, the family of the Tolaites: of Pua, the family of the Punites:

chapters.zh: 属雅述的，有雅述族；属伸仑的，有伸仑族。
chapters.en: Of Jashub, the family of the Jashubites: of Shimron, the family of the Shimronites.

chapters.zh: 这就是以萨迦的各族，照他们中间被数的，共有六万四千三百名。
chapters.en: These the families of Issachar according to those that were numbered of them, threescore and four thousand and three hundred.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，西布伦的众子：属西烈的，有西烈族；属以伦的，有以伦族；属雅利的，有雅利族。
chapters.en: the sons of Zebulun after their families: of Sered, the family of the Sardites: of Elon, the family of the Elonites: of Jahleel, the family of the Jahleelites.

chapters.zh: 这就是西布伦的各族，照他们中间被数的，共有六万零五百名。
chapters.en: These the families of the Zebulunites according to those that were numbered of them, threescore thousand and five hundred.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，约瑟的儿子有玛拿西、以法莲。
chapters.en: The sons of Joseph after their families Manasseh and Ephraim.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西的众子：属玛吉的，有玛吉族；玛吉生基列；属基列的，有基列族。
chapters.en: Of the sons of Manasseh: of Machir, the family of the Machirites: and Machir begat Gilead: of Gilead the family of the Gileadites.

chapters.zh: 基列的众子：属伊以谢的，有伊以谢族；属希勒的，有希勒族；
chapters.en: These the sons of Gilead: Jeezer, the family of the Jeezerites: of Helek, the family of the Helekites:

chapters.zh: 属亚斯烈的，有亚斯烈族；属示剑的，有示剑族；
chapters.en: And Asriel, the family of the Asrielites: and Shechem, the family of the Shechemites:

chapters.zh: 属示米大的，有示米大族；属希弗的，有希弗族；。
chapters.en: And Shemida, the family of the Shemidaites: and Hepher, the family of the Hepherites.

chapters.zh: 希弗的儿子西罗非哈没儿子，只有女儿。西罗非哈女儿的名字就是玛拉、挪阿、曷拉、密迦、得撒。
chapters.en: And Zelophehad the son of Hepher had no sons, but daughters: and the names of the daughters of Zelophehad Mahlah, and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.

chapters.zh: 这就是玛拿西的各族；他们中间被数的，共有五万二千七百名。
chapters.en: These the families of Manasseh, and those that were numbered of them, fifty and two thousand and seven hundred.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，以法莲的众子：属书提拉的，有书提拉族；属比结的，有比结族；属他罕的，有他罕族。
chapters.en: These the sons of Ephraim after their families: of Shuthelah, the family of the Shuthalhites: of Becher, the family of the Bachrites: of Tahan, the family of the Tahanites.

chapters.zh: 书提拉的众子：属以兰的，有以兰族。
chapters.en: And these the sons of Shuthelah: of Eran, the family of the Eranites.

chapters.zh: 这就是以法莲子孙的各族，照他们中间被数的，共有三万二千五百名。按著家族，这都是约瑟的子孙。
chapters.en: These the families of the sons of Ephraim according to those that were numbered of them, thirty and two thousand and five hundred. These the sons of Joseph after their families.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，便雅悯众子，属比拉的，有比拉族；属亚实别的，有亚实别族；属亚希兰的，有亚希兰族；
chapters.en: The sons of Benjamin after their families: of Bela, the family of the Belaites: of Ashbel, the family of the Ashbelites: of Ahiram, the family of the Ahiramites:

chapters.zh: 属书反的，有书反族；属户反的，有户反族。
chapters.en: Of Shupham, the family of the Shuphamites: of Hupham, the family of the Huphamites.

chapters.zh: 比拉的众子是亚勒、乃幔。属亚勒的，有亚勒族；属乃幔的，有乃幔族。
chapters.en: And the sons of Bela were Ard and Naaman: , the family of the Ardites: of Naaman, the family of the Naamites.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，这就是便雅悯的子孙，其中被数的，共有四万五千六百名。
chapters.en: These the sons of Benjamin after their families: and they that were numbered of them forty and five thousand and six hundred.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，但的众子：属书含的，有书含族。按著家族，这就是但的各族。
chapters.en: These the sons of Dan after their families: of Shuham, the family of the Shuhamites. These the families of Dan after their families.

chapters.zh: 照其中被数的，书含所有的各族，共有六万四千四百名。
chapters.en: All the families of the Shuhamites, according to those that were numbered of them, threescore and four thousand and four hundred.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，亚设的众子：属音拿的，有音拿族；属亦施韦的，有亦施韦族；属比利亚的，有比利亚族。
chapters.en: the children of Asher after their families: of Jimna, the family of the Jimnites: of Jesui, the family of the Jesuites: of Beriah, the family of the Beriites.

chapters.zh: 比利亚的众子：属希别的，有希别族；属玛结的，有玛结族。
chapters.en: Of the sons of Beriah: of Heber, the family of the Heberites: of Malchiel, the family of the Malchielites.

chapters.zh: 亚设的女儿名叫西拉。
chapters.en: And the name of the daughter of Asher Sarah.

chapters.zh: 这就是亚设子孙的各族，照他们中间被数的，共有五万三千四百名。
chapters.en: These the families of the sons of Asher according to those that were numbered of them; fifty and three thousand and four hundred.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，拿弗他利的众子：属雅薛的，有雅薛族；属沽尼的，有沽尼族；
chapters.en: the sons of Naphtali after their families: of Jahzeel, the family of the Jahzeelites: of Guni, the family of the Gunites:

chapters.zh: 属耶色的，有耶色族；属示冷的，有示冷族。
chapters.en: Of Jezer, the family of the Jezerites: of Shillem, the family of the Shillemites.

chapters.zh: 按著家族，这就是拿弗他利的各族；他们中间被数的，共有四万五千四百名。
chapters.en: These the families of Naphtali according to their families: and they that were numbered of them forty and five thousand and four hundred.

chapters.zh: 以色列人中被数的，共有六十万零一千七百三十名。
chapters.en: These the numbered of the children of Israel, six hundred thousand and a thousand seven hundred and thirty.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 你要按著人名的数目将地分给这些人为业。
chapters.en: Unto these the land shall be divided for an inheritance according to the number of names.

chapters.zh: 人多的，你要把产业多分给他们；人少的，你要把产业少分给他们；要照被数的人数，把产业分给各人。
chapters.en: To many thou shalt give the more inheritance, and to few thou shalt give the less inheritance: to every one shall his inheritance be given according to those that were numbered of him.

chapters.zh: 虽是这样，还要拈阄分地。他们要按著祖宗各支派的名字承受为业。
chapters.en: Notwithstanding the land shall be divided by lot: according to the names of the tribes of their fathers they shall inherit.

chapters.zh: 要按著所拈的阄，看人数多，人数少，把产业分给他们。
chapters.en: According to the lot shall the possession thereof be divided between many and few.

chapters.zh: 利未人，按著他们的各族被数的：属革顺的，有革顺族；属哥辖的，有哥辖族；属米拉利的，有米拉利族。
chapters.en: And these they that were numbered of the Levites after their families: of Gershon, the family of the Gershonites: of Kohath, the family of the Kohathites: of Merari, the family of the Merarites.

chapters.zh: 利未的各族有立尼族、希伯伦族、玛利族、母示族、可拉族。哥辖生暗兰。
chapters.en: These the families of the Levites: the family of the Libnites, the family of the Hebronites, the family of the Mahlites, the family of the Mushites, the family of the Korathites. And Kohath begat Amram.

chapters.zh: 暗兰的妻名叫约基别，是利未女子，生在埃及。他给暗兰生了亚伦、摩西，并他们的姊姊米利暗。
chapters.en: And the name of Amram's wife Jochebed, the daughter of Levi, whom bare to Levi in Egypt: and she bare unto Amram Aaron and Moses, and Miriam their sister.

chapters.zh: 亚伦生拿答、亚比户、以利亚撒、以他玛。
chapters.en: And unto Aaron was born Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

chapters.zh: 拿答、亚比户在耶和华面前献凡火的时候就死了。
chapters.en: And Nadab and Abihu died, when they offered strange fire before the LORD.

chapters.zh: 利未人中，凡一个月以外、被数的男丁，共有二万三千。他们本来没有数在以色列人中；因为在以色列人中，没有分给他们产业。
chapters.en: And those that were numbered of them were twenty and three thousand, all males from a month old and upward: for they were not numbered among the children of Israel, because there was no inheritance given them among the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 这些就是被摩西和祭司以利亚撒所数的；他们在摩押平原与耶利哥相对的约但河边数点以色列人。
chapters.en: These they that were numbered by Moses and Eleazar the priest, who numbered the children of Israel in the plains of Moab by Jordan Jericho.

chapters.zh: 但被数的人中，没有一个是摩西和祭司亚伦从前在西乃的旷野所数的以色列人，
chapters.en: But among these there was not a man of them whom Moses and Aaron the priest numbered, when they numbered the children of Israel in the wilderness of Sinai.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华论到他们说：他们必要死在旷野。所以，除了耶孚尼的儿子迦勒和嫩的儿子约书亚以外，连一个人也没有存留。
chapters.en: For the LORD had said of them, They shall surely die in the wilderness. And there was not left a man of them, save Caleb the son of Jephunneh, and Joshua the son of Nun.

chapters.zh: 属约瑟的儿子玛拿西的各族，有玛拿西的玄孙，玛吉的曾孙，基列的孙子，希弗的儿子西罗非哈的女儿，名叫玛拉、挪阿、曷拉、密迦、得撒。他们前来，
chapters.en: Then came the daughters of Zelophehad, the son of Hepher, the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, of the families of Manasseh the son of Joseph: and these the names of his daughters; Mahlah, Noah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Tirzah.

chapters.zh: 站在会幕门口，在摩西和祭司以利亚撒，并众首领与全会众面前，说：
chapters.en: And they stood before Moses, and before Eleazar the priest, and before the princes and all the congregation, the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, saying,

chapters.zh: 我们的父亲死在旷野。他不与可拉同党聚集攻击耶和华，是在自己罪中死的；他也没有儿子。
chapters.en: Our father died in the wilderness, and he was not in the company of them that gathered themselves together against the LORD in the company of Korah; but died in his own sin, and had no sons.

chapters.zh: 为甚么因我们的父亲没有儿子就把他的名从他族中除掉呢？求你们在我们父亲的弟兄中分给我们产业。
chapters.en: Why should the name of our father be done away from among his family, because he hath no son? Give unto us a possession among the brethren of our father.

chapters.zh: 于是，摩西将他们的案件呈到耶和华面前。
chapters.en: And Moses brought their cause before the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 西罗非哈的女儿说得有理。你定要在他们父亲的弟兄中，把地分给他们为业；要将他们父亲的产业归给他们。
chapters.en: The daughters of Zelophehad speak right: thou shalt surely give them a possession of an inheritance among their father's brethren; and thou shalt cause the inheritance of their father to pass unto them.

chapters.zh: 你也要晓谕以色列人说：人若死了没有儿子，就要把他的产业归给他的女儿。
chapters.en: And thou shalt speak unto the children of Israel, saying, If a man die, and have no son, then ye shall cause his inheritance to pass unto his daughter.

chapters.zh: 他若没有女儿，就要把他的产业给他的弟兄。
chapters.en: And if he have no daughter, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his brethren.

chapters.zh: 他若没有弟兄，就要把他的产业给他父亲的弟兄。
chapters.en: And if he have no brethren, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his father's brethren.

chapters.zh: 他父亲若没有弟兄，就要把他的产业给他族中最近的亲属，他便要得为业。这要作以色列人的律例典章，是照耶和华吩咐摩西的。
chapters.en: And if his father have no brethren, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his kinsman that is next to him of his family, and he shall possess it: and it shall be unto the children of Israel a statute of judgment, as the LORD commanded Moses.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你上这亚巴琳山，观看我所赐给以色列人的地。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Get thee up into this mount Abarim, and see the land which I have given unto the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 看了以后，你也必归到你列祖（原文作本民）那里，像你哥哥亚伦一样。
chapters.en: And when thou hast seen it, thou also shalt be gathered unto thy people, as Aaron thy brother was gathered.

chapters.zh: 因为你们在寻的旷野，当会众争闹的时候，违背了我的命，没有在涌水之地、会众眼前尊我为圣。（这水就是寻的旷野加低斯米利巴水。）
chapters.en: For ye rebelled against my commandment in the desert of Zin, in the strife of the congregation, to sanctify me at the water before their eyes: that the water of Meribah in Kadesh in the wilderness of Zin.

chapters.zh: 摩西对耶和华说：
chapters.en: And Moses spake unto the LORD, saying,

chapters.zh: 愿耶和华万人之灵的神，立一个人治理会众，
chapters.en: Let the LORD, the God of the spirits of all flesh, set a man over the congregation,

chapters.zh: 可以在他们面前出入，也可以引导他们，免得耶和华的会众如同没有牧人的羊群一般。
chapters.en: Which may go out before them, and which may go in before them, and which may lead them out, and which may bring them in; that the congregation of the LORD be not as sheep which have no shepherd.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：嫩的儿子约书亚是心中有圣灵的；你将他领来，按手在他头上，
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Take thee Joshua the son of Nun, a man in whom the spirit, and lay thine hand upon him;

chapters.zh: 使他站在祭司以利亚撒和全会众面前，嘱咐他，
chapters.en: And set him before Eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation; and give him a charge in their sight.

chapters.zh: 又将你的尊荣给他几分，使以色列全会众都听从他。
chapters.en: And thou shalt put of thine honour upon him, that all the congregation of the children of Israel may be obedient.

chapters.zh: 他要站在祭司以利亚撒面前；以利亚撒要凭乌陵的判断，在耶和华面前为他求问。他和以色列全会众都要遵以利亚撒的命出入。
chapters.en: And he shall stand before Eleazar the priest, who shall ask for him after the judgment of Urim before the LORD: at his word shall they go out, and at his word they shall come in, he, and all the children of Israel with him, even all the congregation.

chapters.zh: 于是摩西照耶和华所吩咐的将约书亚领来，使他站在祭司以利亚撒和全会众面前。
chapters.en: And Moses did as the LORD commanded him: and he took Joshua, and set him before Eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation:

chapters.zh: 按手在他头上，嘱咐他，是照耶和华藉摩西所说的话。
chapters.en: And he laid his hands upon him, and gave him a charge, as the LORD commanded by the hand of Moses.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 你要吩咐以色列人说：献给我的供物，就是献给我作馨香火祭的食物，你们要按日期献给我；
chapters.en: Command the children of Israel, and say unto them, My offering, my bread for my sacrifices made by fire, a sweet savour unto me, shall ye observe to offer unto me in their due season.

chapters.zh: 又要对他们说：你们要献给耶和华的火祭，就是没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔，每日两只，作为常献的燔祭。
chapters.en: And thou shalt say unto them, This the offering made by fire which ye shall offer unto the LORD; two lambs of the first year without spot day by day, a continual burnt offering.

chapters.zh: 早晨要献一只，黄昏的时候要献一只；
chapters.en: The one lamb shalt thou offer in the morning, and the other lamb shalt thou offer at even;

chapters.zh: 又用细面伊法十分之一，并捣成的油一欣四分之一，调和作为素祭。
chapters.en: And a tenth of an ephah of flour for a meat offering, mingled with the fourth of an hin of beaten oil.

chapters.zh: 这是西乃山所命定为常献的燔祭，是献给耶和华为馨香的火祭。
chapters.en: a continual burnt offering, which was ordained in mount Sinai for a sweet savour, a sacrifice made by fire unto the LORD.

chapters.zh: 为这一只羊羔，要同献奠祭的酒一欣四分之一。在圣所中，你要将醇酒奉给耶和华为奠祭。
chapters.en: And the drink offering thereof the fourth of an hin for the one lamb: in the holy shalt thou cause the strong wine to be poured unto the LORD a drink offering.

chapters.zh: 晚上，你要献那一只羊羔，必照早晨的素祭和同献的奠祭献上，作为馨香的火祭，献给耶和华。
chapters.en: And the other lamb shalt thou offer at even: as the meat offering of the morning, and as the drink offering thereof, thou shalt offer , a sacrifice made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD.

chapters.zh: 当安息日，要献两只没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔，并用调油的细面伊法十分之二为素祭，又将同献的奠祭献上。
chapters.en: And on the sabbath day two lambs of the first year without spot, and two tenth deals of flour a meat offering, mingled with oil, and the drink offering thereof:

chapters.zh: 这是每安息日献的燔祭；那常献的燔祭和同献的奠祭在外。
chapters.en: the burnt offering of every sabbath, beside the continual burnt offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 每月朔，你们要将两只公牛犊，一只公绵羊，七只没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔，献给耶和华为燔祭。
chapters.en: And in the beginnings of your months ye shall offer a burnt offering unto the LORD; two young bullocks, and one ram, seven lambs of the first year without spot;

chapters.zh: 每只公牛要用调油的细面伊法十分之三作为素祭；那只公羊也用调油的细面伊法十分之二作为素祭；
chapters.en: And three tenth deals of flour a meat offering, mingled with oil, for one bullock; and two tenth deals of flour a meat offering, mingled with oil, for one ram;

chapters.zh: 每只羊羔要用调油的细面伊法十分之一作为素祭和馨香的燔祭，是献给耶和华的火祭。
chapters.en: And a several tenth deal of flour mingled with oil a meat offering unto one lamb; a burnt offering of a sweet savour, a sacrifice made by fire unto the LORD.

chapters.zh: 一只公牛要奠酒半欣，一只公羊要奠酒一欣三分之一，一只羊羔也奠酒一欣四分之一。这是每月的燔祭，一年之中要月月如此。
chapters.en: And their drink offerings shall be half an hin of wine unto a bullock, and the third of an hin unto a ram, and a fourth of an hin unto a lamb: this the burnt offering of every month throughout the months of the year.

chapters.zh: 又要将一只公山羊为赎罪祭，献给耶和华；要献在常献的燔祭和同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: And one kid of the goats for a sin offering unto the LORD shall be offered, beside the continual burnt offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 正月十四日是耶和华的逾越节。
chapters.en: And in the fourteenth day of the first month the passover of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 这月十五日是节期，要吃无酵饼七日。
chapters.en: And in the fifteenth day of this month the feast: seven days shall unleavened bread be eaten.

chapters.zh: 第一日当有圣会；甚么劳碌的工都不可做。
chapters.en: In the first day an holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work :

chapters.zh: 当将公牛犊两只，公绵羊一只，一岁的公羊羔七只，都要没有残疾的，用火献给耶和华为燔祭。
chapters.en: But ye shall offer a sacrifice made by fire a burnt offering unto the LORD; two young bullocks, and one ram, and seven lambs of the first year: they shall be unto you without blemish:

chapters.zh: 同献的素祭用调油的细面；为一只公牛要献伊法十分之三；为一只公羊要献伊法十分之二；
chapters.en: And their meat offering flour mingled with oil: three tenth deals shall ye offer for a bullock, and two tenth deals for a ram;

chapters.zh: 为那七只羊羔，每只要献伊法十分之一。
chapters.en: A several tenth deal shalt thou offer for every lamb, throughout the seven lambs:

chapters.zh: 并献一只公山羊作赎罪祭，为你们赎罪。
chapters.en: And one goat a sin offering, to make an atonement for you.

chapters.zh: 你们献这些，要在早晨常献的燔祭以外。
chapters.en: Ye shall offer these beside the burnt offering in the morning, which for a continual burnt offering.

chapters.zh: 一连七日，每日要照这例把馨香火祭的食物献给耶和华，是在常献的燔祭和同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: After this manner ye shall offer daily, throughout the seven days, the meat of the sacrifice made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD: it shall be offered beside the continual burnt offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 第七日当有圣会，甚么劳碌的工都不可做。
chapters.en: And on the seventh day ye shall have an holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work.

chapters.zh: 七七节庄稼初熟，你们献新素祭给耶和华的日子，当有圣会；甚么劳碌的工都不可做。
chapters.en: Also in the day of the firstfruits, when ye bring a new meat offering unto the LORD, after your weeks , ye shall have an holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work:

chapters.zh: 只要将公牛犊两只，公绵羊一只，一岁的公羊羔七只，作为馨香的燔祭献给耶和华。
chapters.en: But ye shall offer the burnt offering for a sweet savour unto the LORD; two young bullocks, one ram, seven lambs of the first year;

chapters.zh: 同献的素祭用调油的细面；为每只公牛要献伊法十分之三；为一只公羊要献伊法十分之二；
chapters.en: And their meat offering of flour mingled with oil, three tenth deals unto one bullock, two tenth deals unto one ram,

chapters.zh: 为那七只羊羔，每只要献伊法十分之一。
chapters.en: A several tenth deal unto one lamb, throughout the seven lambs;

chapters.zh: 并献一只公山羊为你们赎罪。
chapters.en: one kid of the goats, to make an atonement for you.

chapters.zh: 这些，你们要献在常献的燔祭和同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外，都要没有残疾的。
chapters.en: Ye shall offer beside the continual burnt offering, and his meat offering, (they shall be unto you without blemish) and their drink offerings.

chapters.zh: 七月初一日，你们当有圣会；甚么劳碌的工都不可做，是你们当守为吹角的日子。
chapters.en: And in the seventh month, on the first of the month, ye shall have an holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work: it is a day of blowing the trumpets unto you.

chapters.zh: 你们要将公牛犊一只，公绵羊一只，没有残疾一岁的公羊羔七只，作为馨香的燔祭献给耶和华。
chapters.en: And ye shall offer a burnt offering for a sweet savour unto the LORD; one young bullock, one ram, seven lambs of the first year without blemish:

chapters.zh: 同献的素祭用调油的细面；为一只公牛要献伊法十分之三；为一只公羊要献伊法十分之二；
chapters.en: And their meat offering flour mingled with oil, three tenth deals for a bullock, two tenth deals for a ram,

chapters.zh: 为那七只羊羔，每只要献伊法十分之一。
chapters.en: And one tenth deal for one lamb, throughout the seven lambs:

chapters.zh: 又献一只公山羊作赎罪祭，为你们赎罪。
chapters.en: And one kid of the goats a sin offering, to make an atonement for you:

chapters.zh: 这些是在月朔的燔祭和同献的素祭，并常献的燔祭与同献的素祭，以及照例同献的奠祭以外，都作为馨香的火祭献给耶和华。
chapters.en: Beside the burnt offering of the month, and his meat offering, and the daily burnt offering, and his meat offering, and their drink offerings, according unto their manner, for a sweet savour, a sacrifice made by fire unto the LORD.

chapters.zh: 七月初十日，你们当有圣会；要刻苦己心，甚么工都不可做。
chapters.en: And ye shall have on the tenth of this seventh month an holy convocation; and ye shall afflict your souls: ye shall not do any work :

chapters.zh: 只要将公牛犊一只，公绵羊一只，一岁的公羊羔七只，都要没有残疾的，作为馨香的燔祭献给耶和华。
chapters.en: But ye shall offer a burnt offering unto the LORD a sweet savour; one young bullock, one ram, seven lambs of the first year; they shall be unto you without blemish:

chapters.zh: 同献的素祭用调油的细面：为一只公牛要献伊法十分之三；为一只公羊要献伊法十分之二；
chapters.en: And their meat offering flour mingled with oil, three tenth deals to a bullock, two tenth deals to one ram,

chapters.zh: 为那七只羊羔，每只要献伊法十分之一。
chapters.en: A several tenth deal for one lamb, throughout the seven lambs:

chapters.zh: 又献一只公山羊为赎罪祭。这是在赎罪祭和常献的燔祭，与同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: One kid of the goats a sin offering; beside the sin offering of atonement, and the continual burnt offering, and the meat offering of it, and their drink offerings.

chapters.zh: 七月十五日，你们当有圣会；甚么劳碌的工都不可做，要向耶和华守节七日。
chapters.en: And on the fifteenth day of the seventh month ye shall have an holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work, and ye shall keep a feast unto the LORD seven days:

chapters.zh: 又要将公牛犊十三只，公绵羊两只，一岁的公羊羔十四只，都要没有残疾的，用火献给耶和华为馨香的燔祭。
chapters.en: And ye shall offer a burnt offering, a sacrifice made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD; thirteen young bullocks, two rams, fourteen lambs of the first year; they shall be without blemish:

chapters.zh: 同献的素祭用调油的细面；为那十三只公牛，每只要献伊法十分之三；为那两只公羊，每只要献伊法十分之二；
chapters.en: And their meat offering flour mingled with oil, three tenth deals unto every bullock of the thirteen bullocks, two tenth deals to each ram of the two rams,

chapters.zh: 为那十四只羊羔，每只要献伊法十分之一。
chapters.en: And a several tenth deal to each lamb of the fourteen lambs:

chapters.zh: 并献一只公山羊为赎罪祭，这是在常献的燔祭和同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: And one kid of the goats a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, his meat offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 第二日要献公牛犊十二只，公绵羊两只，没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔十四只；
chapters.en: And on the second day twelve young bullocks, two rams, fourteen lambs of the first year without spot:

chapters.zh: 并为公牛、公羊，和羊羔，按数照例，献同献的素祭和同献的奠祭。
chapters.en: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the manner:

chapters.zh: 又要献一只公山羊为赎罪祭。这是在常献的燔祭和同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: And one kid of the goats a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, and the meat offering thereof, and their drink offerings.

chapters.zh: 第三日要献公牛十一只，公羊两只，没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔十四只；
chapters.en: And on the third day eleven bullocks, two rams, fourteen lambs of the first year without blemish;

chapters.zh: 并为公牛、公羊，和羊羔，按数照例，献同献的素祭和同献的奠祭。
chapters.en: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the manner:

chapters.zh: 又要献一只公山羊为赎罪祭。这是在常献的燔祭和同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: And one goat a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, and his meat offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 第四日要献公牛十只，公羊两只，没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔十四只；
chapters.en: And on the fourth day ten bullocks, two rams, fourteen lambs of the first year without blemish:

chapters.zh: 并为公牛、公羊，和羊羔，按数照例，献同献的素祭和同献的奠祭。
chapters.en: Their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the manner:

chapters.zh: 又要献一只公山羊为赎罪祭。这是在常献的燔祭和同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: And one kid of the goats a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, his meat offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 第五日要献公牛九只，公羊两只，没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔十四只；
chapters.en: And on the fifth day nine bullocks, two rams, fourteen lambs of the first year without spot:

chapters.zh: 并为公牛、公羊，和羊羔，按数照例，献同献的素祭和同献的奠祭。
chapters.en: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the manner:

chapters.zh: 又要献一只公山羊为赎罪祭。这是在常献的燔祭和同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: And one goat a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, and his meat offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 第六日要献公牛八只，公羊两只，没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔十四只；
chapters.en: And on the sixth day eight bullocks, two rams, fourteen lambs of the first year without blemish:

chapters.zh: 并为公牛、公羊，和羊羔，按数照例，献同献的素祭和同献的奠祭。
chapters.en: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the manner:

chapters.zh: 又要献一只公山羊为赎罪祭。这是在常献的燔祭和同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: And one goat a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, his meat offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 第七日要献公牛七只，公羊两只，没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔十四只；
chapters.en: And on the seventh day seven bullocks, two rams, fourteen lambs of the first year without blemish:

chapters.zh: 并为公牛、公羊，和羊羔，按数照例，献同献的素祭和同献的奠祭。
chapters.en: And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the manner:

chapters.zh: 又要献一只公山羊为赎罪祭。这是在常献的燔祭和同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: And one goat a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, his meat offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 第八日你们当有严肃会；甚么劳碌的工都不可做；
chapters.en: On the eighth day ye shall have a solemn assembly: ye shall do no servile work :

chapters.zh: 只要将公牛一只，公羊一只，没有残疾、一岁的公羊羔七只作火祭，献给耶和华为馨香的燔祭；
chapters.en: But ye shall offer a burnt offering, a sacrifice made by fire, of a sweet savour unto the LORD: one bullock, one ram, seven lambs of the first year without blemish:

chapters.zh: 并为公牛、公羊，和羊羔，按数照例，献同献的素祭和同献的奠祭。
chapters.en: Their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullock, for the ram, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the manner:

chapters.zh: 又要献一只公山羊为赎罪祭。这是在常献的燔祭和同献的素祭并同献的奠祭以外。
chapters.en: And one goat a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering, and his meat offering, and his drink offering.

chapters.zh: 这些祭要在你们的节期献给耶和华，都在所许的愿并甘心所献的以外，作为你们的燔祭、素祭、奠祭，和平安祭。
chapters.en: These ye shall do unto the LORD in your set feasts, beside your vows, and your freewill offerings, for your burnt offerings, and for your meat offerings, and for your drink offerings, and for your peace offerings.

chapters.zh: 于是，摩西照耶和华所吩咐他的一切话告诉以色列人。
chapters.en: And Moses told the children of Israel according to all that the LORD commanded Moses.

chapters.zh: 摩西晓谕以色列各支派的首领说：耶和华所吩咐的乃是这样：
chapters.en: And Moses spake unto the heads of the tribes concerning the children of Israel, saying, This the thing which the LORD hath commanded.

chapters.zh: 人若向耶和华许愿或起誓，要约束自己，就不可食言，必要按口中所出的一切话行。
chapters.en: If a man vow a vow unto the LORD, or swear an oath to bind his soul with a bond; he shall not break his word, he shall do according to all that proceedeth out of his mouth.

chapters.zh: 女子年幼、还在父家的时候，若向耶和华许愿，要约束自己，
chapters.en: If a woman also vow a vow unto the LORD, and bind herself by a bond, in her father's house in her youth;

chapters.zh: 他父亲也听见他所许的愿并约束自己的话，却向他默默不言，他所许的愿并约束自己的话就都要为定 .。
chapters.en: And her father hear her vow, and her bond wherewith she hath bound her soul, and her father shall hold his peace at her: then all her vows shall stand, and every bond wherewith she hath bound her soul shall stand.

chapters.zh: 但他父亲听见的日子若不应承他所许的愿和约束自己的话，就都不得为定；耶和华也必赦免他，因为他父亲不应承。
chapters.en: But if her father disallow her in the day that he heareth; not any of her vows, or of her bonds wherewith she hath bound her soul, shall stand: and the LORD shall forgive her, because her father disallowed her.

chapters.zh: 他若出了嫁，有愿在身，或是口中出了约束自己的冒失话，
chapters.en: And if she had at all an husband, when she vowed, or uttered ought out of her lips, wherewith she bound her soul;

chapters.zh: 他丈夫听见的日子，却向他默默不言，他所许的愿并约束自己的话就都要为定。
chapters.en: And her husband heard and held his peace at her in the day that he heard : then her vows shall stand, and her bonds wherewith she bound her soul shall stand.

chapters.zh: 但他丈夫听见的日子，若不应承，就算废了他所许的愿和他出口约束自己的冒失话；耶和华也必赦免他。
chapters.en: But if her husband disallowed her on the day that he heard ; then he shall make her vow which she vowed, and that which she uttered with her lips, wherewith she bound her soul, of none effect: and the LORD shall forgive her.

chapters.zh: 寡妇或是被休的妇人所许的愿，就是他约束自己的话，都要为定。
chapters.en: But every vow of a widow, and of her that is divorced, wherewith they have bound their souls, shall stand against her.

chapters.zh: 他若在丈夫家里许了愿或起了誓，约束自己，
chapters.en: And if she vowed in her husband's house, or bound her soul by a bond with an oath;

chapters.zh: 丈夫听见，却向他默默不言，也没有不应承，他所许的愿并约束自己的话就都要为定。
chapters.en: And her husband heard , and held his peace at her, disallowed her not: then all her vows shall stand, and every bond wherewith she bound her soul shall stand.

chapters.zh: 丈夫听见的日子，若把这两样全废了，妇人口中所许的愿或是约束自己的话就都不得为定，因他丈夫已经把这两样废了；耶和华也必赦免他。
chapters.en: But if her husband hath utterly made them void on the day he heard whatsoever proceeded out of her lips concerning her vows, or concerning the bond of her soul, shall not stand: her husband hath made them void; and the LORD shall forgive her.

chapters.zh: 凡他所许的愿和刻苦约束自己所起的誓，他丈夫可以坚定，也可以废去。
chapters.en: Every vow, and every binding oath to afflict the soul, her husband may establish it, or her husband may make it void.

chapters.zh: 倘若他丈夫天天向他默默不言，就算是坚定他所许的愿和约束自己的话；因丈夫听见的日子向他默默不言，就使这两样坚定。
chapters.en: But if her husband altogether hold his peace at her from day to day; then he establisheth all her vows, or all her bonds, which upon her: he confirmeth them, because he held his peace at her in the day that he heard .

chapters.zh: 但他丈夫听见以后，若使这两样全废了，就要担当妇人的罪孽。
chapters.en: But if he shall any ways make them void after that he hath heard ; then he shall bear her iniquity.

chapters.zh: 这是丈夫待妻子，父亲待女儿，女儿年幼、还在父家，耶和华所吩咐摩西的律例。
chapters.en: These the statutes, which the LORD commanded Moses, between a man and his wife, between the father and his daughter, in her youth in her father's house.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 你要在米甸人身上报以色列人的仇，后来要归到你列祖（原文作本民）那里。
chapters.en: Avenge the children of Israel of the Midianites: afterward shalt thou be gathered unto thy people.

chapters.zh: 摩西吩咐百姓说：要从你们中间叫人带兵器出去攻击米甸，好在米甸人身上为耶和华报仇。
chapters.en: And Moses spake unto the people, saying, Arm some of yourselves unto the war, and let them go against the Midianites, and avenge the LORD of Midian.

chapters.zh: 从以色列众支派中，每支派要打发一千人去打仗。
chapters.en: Of every tribe a thousand, throughout all the tribes of Israel, shall ye send to the war.

chapters.zh: 于是从以色列千万人中，每支派交出一千人，共一万二千人，带著兵器预备打仗。
chapters.en: So there were delivered out of the thousands of Israel, a thousand of tribe, twelve thousand armed for war.

chapters.zh: 摩西就打发每支派的一千人去打仗，并打发祭司以利亚撒的儿子非尼哈同去；非尼哈手里拿著圣所的器皿和吹大声的号筒。
chapters.en: And Moses sent them to the war, a thousand of tribe, them and Phinehas the son of Eleazar the priest, to the war, with the holy instruments, and the trumpets to blow in his hand.

chapters.zh: 他们就照耶和华所吩咐摩西的，与米甸人打仗，杀了所有的男丁。
chapters.en: And they warred against the Midianites, as the LORD commanded Moses; and they slew all the males.

chapters.zh: 在所杀的人中，杀了米甸的五王，就是以未、利金、苏珥、户珥、利巴，又用刀杀了比珥的儿子巴兰。
chapters.en: And they slew the kings of Midian, beside the rest of them that were slain; , Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, five kings of Midian: Balaam also the son of Beor they slew with the sword.

chapters.zh: 以色列人掳了米甸人的妇女孩子，并将他们的牲畜、羊群，和所有的财物都夺了来，当作掳物，
chapters.en: And the children of Israel took the women of Midian captives, and their little ones, and took the spoil of all their cattle, and all their flocks, and all their goods.

chapters.zh: 又用火焚烧他们所住的城邑和所有的营寨，
chapters.en: And they burnt all their cities wherein they dwelt, and all their goodly castles, with fire.

chapters.zh: 把一切所夺的、所掳的，连人带牲畜都带了去，
chapters.en: And they took all the spoil, and all the prey, of men and of beasts.

chapters.zh: 将所掳的人，所夺的牲畜、财物，都带到摩押平原，在约但河边与耶利哥相对的营盘，交给摩西和祭司以利亚撒，并以色列的会众。
chapters.en: And they brought the captives, and the prey, and the spoil, unto Moses, and Eleazar the priest, and unto the congregation of the children of Israel, unto the camp at the plains of Moab, which by Jordan Jericho.

chapters.zh: 摩西和祭司以利亚撒，并会众一切的首领，都出到营外迎接他们。
chapters.en: And Moses, and Eleazar the priest, and all the princes of the congregation, went forth to meet them without the camp.

chapters.zh: 摩西向打仗回来的军长，就是千夫长、百夫长，发怒，
chapters.en: And Moses was wroth with the officers of the host, the captains over thousands, and captains over hundreds, which came from the battle.

chapters.zh: 对他们说：你们要存留这一切妇女的活命么？
chapters.en: And Moses said unto them, Have ye saved all the women alive?

chapters.zh: 这些妇女因巴兰的计谋，叫以色列人在毘珥的事上得罪耶和华，以致耶和华的会众遭遇瘟疫。
chapters.en: Behold, these caused the children of Israel, through the counsel of Balaam, to commit trespass against the LORD in the matter of Peor, and there was a plague among the congregation of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们要把一切的男孩和所有已嫁的女子都杀了。
chapters.en: Now therefore kill every male among the little ones, and kill every woman that hath known man by lying with him.

chapters.zh: 但女孩子中，凡没有出嫁的，你们都可以存留他的活命。
chapters.en: But all the women children, that have not known a man by lying with him, keep alive for yourselves.

chapters.zh: 你们要在营外驻扎七日；凡杀了人的，和一切摸了被杀的，并你们所掳来的人口，第三日，第七日，都要洁净自己，
chapters.en: And do ye abide without the camp seven days: whosoever hath killed any person, and whosoever hath touched any slain, purify yourselves and your captives on the third day, and on the seventh day.

chapters.zh: 也要因一切的衣服、皮物、山羊毛织的物，和各样的木器，洁净自己。
chapters.en: And purify all raiment, and all that is made of skins, and all work of goats' , and all things made of wood.

chapters.zh: 祭司以利亚撒对打仗回来的兵丁说：耶和华所吩咐摩西律法中的条例乃是这样：
chapters.en: And Eleazar the priest said unto the men of war which went to the battle, This the ordinance of the law which the LORD commanded Moses;

chapters.zh: 金、银、铜、铁、锡、铅，
chapters.en: Only the gold, and the silver, the brass, the iron, the tin, and the lead,

chapters.zh: 凡能见火的，你们要叫他经火就为洁净，然而还要用除污秽的水洁净他；凡不能见火的，你们要叫他过水。
chapters.en: Every thing that may abide the fire, ye shall make go through the fire, and it shall be clean: nevertheless it shall be purified with the water of separation: and all that abideth not the fire ye shall make go through the water.

chapters.zh: 第七日，你们要洗衣服，就为洁净，然后可以进营。
chapters.en: And ye shall wash your clothes on the seventh day, and ye shall be clean, and afterward ye shall come into the camp.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 你和祭司以利亚撒，并会众的各族长，要计算所掳来的人口和牲畜的总数。
chapters.en: Take the sum of the prey that was taken, of man and of beast, thou, and Eleazar the priest, and the chief fathers of the congregation:

chapters.zh: 把所掳来的分作两半：一半归与出去打仗的精兵，一半归与全会众。
chapters.en: And divide the prey into two parts; between them that took the war upon them, who went out to battle, and between all the congregation:

chapters.zh: 又要从出去打仗所得的人口、牛、驴、羊群中，每五百取一，作为贡物奉给耶和华。
chapters.en: And levy a tribute unto the LORD of the men of war which went out to battle: one soul of five hundred, of the persons, and of the beeves, and of the asses, and of the sheep:

chapters.zh: 从他们一半之中，要取出来交给祭司以利亚撒，作为耶和华的举祭。
chapters.en: Take of their half, and give it unto Eleazar the priest, an heave offering of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 从以色列人的一半之中，就是从人口、牛、驴、羊群、各样牲畜中，每五十取一，交给看守耶和华帐幕的利未人。
chapters.en: And of the children of Israel's half, thou shalt take one portion of fifty, of the persons, of the beeves, of the asses, and of the flocks, of all manner of beasts, and give them unto the Levites, which keep the charge of the tabernacle of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 于是摩西和祭司以利亚撒照耶和华所吩咐摩西的行了。
chapters.en: And Moses and Eleazar the priest did as the LORD commanded Moses.

chapters.zh: 除了兵丁所夺的财物以外，所掳来的：羊六十七万五千只；
chapters.en: And the booty, the rest of the prey which the men of war had caught, was six hundred thousand and seventy thousand and five thousand sheep,

chapters.zh: 牛七万二千只；
chapters.en: And threescore and twelve thousand beeves,

chapters.zh: 驴六万一千匹；
chapters.en: And threescore and one thousand asses,

chapters.zh: 女人共三万二千口，都是没有出嫁的。
chapters.en: And thirty and two thousand persons in all, of women that had not known man by lying with him.

chapters.zh: 出去打仗之人的分，就是他们所得的那一半，共计羊三十三万七千五百只，
chapters.en: And the half, the portion of them that went out to war, was in number three hundred thousand and seven and thirty thousand and five hundred sheep:

chapters.zh: 从其中归耶和华为贡物的，有六百七十五只；
chapters.en: And the LORD'S tribute of the sheep was six hundred and threescore and fifteen.

chapters.zh: 牛三万六千只，从其中归耶和华为贡物的，有七十二只；
chapters.en: And the beeves thirty and six thousand; of which the LORD'S tribute threescore and twelve.

chapters.zh: 驴三万零五百匹，从其中归耶和华为贡物的，有六十一匹；
chapters.en: And the asses thirty thousand and five hundred; of which the LORD'S tribute threescore and one.

chapters.zh: 人一万六千口，从其中归耶和华的，有三十二口。
chapters.en: And the persons sixteen thousand; of which the LORD'S tribute thirty and two persons.

chapters.zh: 摩西把贡物，就是归与耶和华的举祭，交给祭司以利亚撒，是照耶和华所吩咐摩西的。
chapters.en: And Moses gave the tribute, the LORD'S heave offering, unto Eleazar the priest, as the LORD commanded Moses.

chapters.zh: 以色列人所得的那一半，就是摩西从打仗的人取来分给他们的。
chapters.en: And of the children of Israel's half, which Moses divided from the men that warred,

chapters.zh: （会众的那一半有：羊三十三万七千五百只；
chapters.en: (Now the half the congregation was three hundred thousand and thirty thousand seven thousand and five hundred sheep,

chapters.zh: 牛三万六千只；
chapters.en: And thirty and six thousand beeves,

chapters.zh: 驴三万零五百匹；
chapters.en: And thirty thousand asses and five hundred,

chapters.zh: 人一万六千口。）
chapters.en: And sixteen thousand persons;)

chapters.zh: 无论是人口是牲畜，摩西每五十取一，交给看守耶和华帐幕的利未人，是照耶和华所吩咐摩西的。
chapters.en: Even of the children of Israel's half, Moses took one portion of fifty, of man and of beast, and gave them unto the Levites, which kept the charge of the tabernacle of the LORD; as the LORD commanded Moses.

chapters.zh: 带领千军的各军长，就是千夫长、百夫长，都近前来见摩西，
chapters.en: And the officers which over thousands of the host, the captains of thousands, and captains of hundreds, came near unto Moses:

chapters.zh: 对他说：仆人权下的兵已经计算总数，并不短少一人。
chapters.en: And they said unto Moses, Thy servants have taken the sum of the men of war which under our charge, and there lacketh not one man of us.

chapters.zh: 如今我们将各人所得的金器，就是脚炼子、镯子、打印的戒指、耳环、手钏，都送来为耶和华的供物，好在耶和华面前为我们的生命赎罪。
chapters.en: We have therefore brought an oblation for the LORD, what every man hath gotten, of jewels of gold, chains, and bracelets, rings, earrings, and tablets, to make an atonement for our souls before the LORD.

chapters.zh: 摩西和祭司以利亚撒就收了他们的金子，都是打成的器皿。
chapters.en: And Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold of them, all wrought jewels.

chapters.zh: 千夫长、百夫长所献给耶和华为举祭的金子共有一万六千七百五十舍客勒。
chapters.en: And all the gold of the offering that they offered up to the LORD, of the captains of thousands, and of the captains of hundreds, was sixteen thousand seven hundred and fifty shekels.

chapters.zh: 各兵丁都为自己夺了财物。
chapters.en: ( the men of war had taken spoil, every man for himself.)

chapters.zh: 摩西和祭司以利亚撒收了千夫长、百夫长的金子，就带进会幕，在耶和华面前作为以色列人的纪念。
chapters.en: And Moses and Eleazar the priest took the gold of the captains of thousands and of hundreds, and brought it into the tabernacle of the congregation, a memorial for the children of Israel before the LORD.

chapters.zh: 流便子孙和迦得子孙的牲畜极其众多；他们看见雅谢地和基列地是可牧放牲畜之地，
chapters.en: Now the children of Reuben and the children of Gad had a very great multitude of cattle: and when they saw the land of Jazer, and the land of Gilead, that, behold, the place a place for cattle;

chapters.zh: 就来见摩西和祭司以利亚撒，并会众的首领，说：
chapters.en: The children of Gad and the children of Reuben came and spake unto Moses, and to Eleazar the priest, and unto the princes of the congregation, saying,

chapters.zh: 亚大录、底本、雅谢、宁拉、希实本、以利亚利、示班、尼波、比稳，
chapters.en: Ataroth, and Dibon, and Jazer, and Nimrah, and Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Shebam, and Nebo, and Beon,

chapters.zh: 就是耶和华在以色列会众前面所攻取之地，是可牧放牲畜之地，你仆人也有牲畜；
chapters.en: the country which the LORD smote before the congregation of Israel, a land for cattle, and thy servants have cattle:

chapters.zh: 又说：我们若在你眼前蒙恩，求你把这地给我们为业，不要领我们过约但河。
chapters.en: Wherefore, said they, if we have found grace in thy sight, let this land be given unto thy servants for a possession, bring us not over Jordan.

chapters.zh: 摩西对迦得子孙和流便子孙说：难道你们的弟兄去打仗，你们竟坐在这里么？
chapters.en: And Moses said unto the children of Gad and to the children of Reuben, Shall your brethren go to war, and shall ye sit here?

chapters.zh: 你们为何使以色列人灰心丧胆、不过去进入耶和华所赐给他们的那地呢？
chapters.en: And wherefore discourage ye the heart of the children of Israel from going over into the land which the LORD hath given them?

chapters.zh: 我先前从加低斯巴尼亚打发你们先祖去窥探那地，他们也是这样行。
chapters.en: Thus did your fathers, when I sent them from Kadeshbarnea to see the land.

chapters.zh: 他们上以实各谷，去窥探那地回来的时候，使以色列人灰心丧胆，不进入耶和华所赐给他们的地。
chapters.en: For when they went up unto the valley of Eshcol, and saw the land, they discouraged the heart of the children of Israel, that they should not go into the land which the LORD had given them.

chapters.zh: 当日，耶和华的怒气发作，就起誓说：
chapters.en: And the LORD'S anger was kindled the same time, and he sware, saying,

chapters.zh: 凡从埃及上来、二十岁以外的人断不得看见我对亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各起誓应许之地，因为他们没有专心跟从我。
chapters.en: Surely none of the men that came up out of Egypt, from twenty years old and upward, shall see the land which I sware unto Abraham, unto Isaac, and unto Jacob; because they have not wholly followed me:

chapters.zh: 惟有基尼洗族耶孚尼的儿子迦勒和嫩的儿子约书亚可以看见，因为他们专心跟从我。
chapters.en: Save Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite, and Joshua the son of Nun: for they have wholly followed the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的怒气向以色列人发作，使他们在旷野飘流四十年，等到在耶和华眼前行恶的那一代人都消灭了。
chapters.en: And the LORD'S anger was kindled against Israel, and he made them wander in the wilderness forty years, until all the generation, that had done evil in the sight of the LORD, was consumed.

chapters.zh: 谁知，你们起来接续先祖，增添罪人的数目，使耶和华向以色列大发烈怒。
chapters.en: And, behold, ye are risen up in your fathers' stead, an increase of sinful men, to augment yet the fierce anger of the LORD toward Israel.

chapters.zh: 你们若退后不跟从他，他还要把以色列人撇在旷野，便是你们使这众民灭亡。
chapters.en: For if ye turn away from after him, he will yet again leave them in the wilderness; and ye shall destroy all this people.

chapters.zh: 两支派的人挨近摩西，说：我们要在这里为牲畜垒圈，为妇人孩子造城。
chapters.en: And they came near unto him, and said, We will build sheepfolds here for our cattle, and cities for our little ones:

chapters.zh: 我们自己要带兵器行在以色列人的前头，好把他们领到他们的地方；但我们的妇人孩子，因这地居民的缘故，要住在坚固的城内。
chapters.en: But we ourselves will go ready armed before the children of Israel, until we have brought them unto their place: and our little ones shall dwell in the fenced cities because of the inhabitants of the land.

chapters.zh: 我们不回家，直等到以色列人各承受自己的产业。
chapters.en: We will not return unto our houses, until the children of Israel have inherited every man his inheritance.

chapters.zh: 我们不和他们在约但河那边一带之地同受产业，因为我们的产业是坐落在约但河东边这里。
chapters.en: For we will not inherit with them on yonder side Jordan, or forward; because our inheritance is fallen to us on this side Jordan eastward.

chapters.zh: 摩西对他们说：你们若这样行，在耶和华面前带著兵器出去打仗，
chapters.en: And Moses said unto them, If ye will do this thing, if ye will go armed before the LORD to war,

chapters.zh: 所有带兵器的人都要在耶和华面前过约但河，等他赶出他的仇敌，
chapters.en: And will go all of you armed over Jordan before the LORD, until he hath driven out his enemies from before him,

chapters.zh: 那地被耶和华制伏了，然后你们可以回来，向耶和华和以色列才为无罪，这地也必在耶和华面前归你们为业。
chapters.en: And the land be subdued before the LORD: then afterward ye shall return, and be guiltless before the LORD, and before Israel; and this land shall be your possession before the LORD.

chapters.zh: 倘若你们不这样行，就得罪耶和华，要知道你们的罪必追上你们。
chapters.en: But if ye will not do so, behold, ye have sinned against the LORD: and be sure your sin will find you out.

chapters.zh: 如今你们口中所出的，只管去行，为你们的妇人孩子造城，为你们的羊群垒圈。
chapters.en: Build you cities for your little ones, and folds for your sheep; and do that which hath proceeded out of your mouth.

chapters.zh: 迦得子孙和流便子孙对摩西说：仆人要照我主所吩咐的去行。
chapters.en: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben spake unto Moses, saying, Thy servants will do as my lord commandeth.

chapters.zh: 我们的妻子、孩子、羊群，和所有的牲畜都要留在基列的各城。
chapters.en: Our little ones, our wives, our flocks, and all our cattle, shall be there in the cities of Gilead:

chapters.zh: 但你的仆人，凡带兵器的，都要照我主所说的话，在耶和华面前过去打仗。
chapters.en: But thy servants will pass over, every man armed for war, before the LORD to battle, as my lord saith.

chapters.zh: 于是，摩西为他们嘱咐祭司以利亚撒和嫩的儿子约书亚，并以色列众支派的族长，说：
chapters.en: So concerning them Moses commanded Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the chief fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel:

chapters.zh: 迦得子孙和流便子孙，凡带兵器在耶和华面前去打仗的，若与你们一同过约但河，那地被你们制伏了，你们就要把基列地给他们为业。
chapters.en: And Moses said unto them, If the children of Gad and the children of Reuben will pass with you over Jordan, every man armed to battle, before the LORD, and the land shall be subdued before you; then ye shall give them the land of Gilead for a possession:

chapters.zh: 倘若他们不带兵器和你们一同过去，就要在迦南地你们中间得产业。
chapters.en: But if they will not pass over with you armed, they shall have possessions among you in the land of Canaan.

chapters.zh: 迦得子孙和流便子孙回答说：耶和华怎样吩咐仆人，仆人就怎样行。
chapters.en: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben answered, saying, As the LORD hath said unto thy servants, so will we do.

chapters.zh: 我们要带兵器，在耶和华面前过去，进入迦南地，只是约但河这边、我们所得为业之地仍归我们。
chapters.en: We will pass over armed before the LORD into the land of Canaan, that the possession of our inheritance on this side Jordan ours.

chapters.zh: 摩西将亚摩利王西宏的国和巴珊王噩的国，连那地和周围的城邑，都给了迦得子孙和流便子孙，并约瑟的儿子玛拿西半个支派。
chapters.en: And Moses gave unto them, to the children of Gad, and to the children of Reuben, and unto half the tribe of Manasseh the son of Joseph, the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, and the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, the land, with the cities thereof in the coasts, the cities of the country round about.

chapters.zh: 迦得子孙建造底本、亚他录、亚罗珥、
chapters.en: And the children of Gad built Dibon, and Ataroth, and Aroer,

chapters.zh: 亚他录朔反、雅谢、约比哈、
chapters.en: And Atroth, Shophan, and Jaazer, and Jogbehah,

chapters.zh: 伯宁拉、伯哈兰，都是坚固城。他们又垒羊圈。
chapters.en: And Bethnimrah, and Bethharan, fenced cities: and folds for sheep.

chapters.zh: 流便子孙建造希实本、以利亚利、基列亭、
chapters.en: And the children of Reuben built Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Kirjathaim,

chapters.zh: 尼波、巴力免、西比玛（尼波、巴力免，名字是改了的），又给他们所建造的城另起别名。
chapters.en: And Nebo, and Baalmeon, (their names being changed,) and Shibmah: and gave other names unto the cities which they builded.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西的儿子玛吉，他的子孙往基列去，占了那地，赶出那里的亚摩利人。
chapters.en: And the children of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead, and took it, and dispossessed the Amorite which in it.

chapters.zh: 摩西将基列赐给玛拿西的儿子玛吉，他子孙就住在那里。
chapters.en: And Moses gave Gilead unto Machir the son of Manasseh; and he dwelt therein.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西的子孙睚珥去占了基列的村庄，就称这些村庄为哈倭特睚珥。
chapters.en: And Jair the son of Manasseh went and took the small towns thereof, and called them Havothjair.

chapters.zh: 挪巴去占了基纳和基纳的乡村，就按自己的名称基纳为挪巴。
chapters.en: And Nobah went and took Kenath, and the villages thereof, and called it Nobah, after his own name.

chapters.zh: 以色列人按著军队，在摩西、亚伦的手下出埃及地所行的路程（或作：站口；下同）记在下面。
chapters.en: These the journeys of the children of Israel, which went forth out of the land of Egypt with their armies under the hand of Moses and Aaron.

chapters.zh: 摩西遵著耶和华的吩咐记载他们所行的路程，其路程乃是这样：
chapters.en: And Moses wrote their goings out according to their journeys by the commandment of the LORD: and these their journeys according to their goings out.

chapters.zh: 正月十五日，就是逾越节的次日，以色列人从兰塞起行，在一切埃及人眼前昂然无惧的出去。
chapters.en: And they departed from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month; on the morrow after the passover the children of Israel went out with an high hand in the sight of all the Egyptians.

chapters.zh: 那时，埃及人正葬埋他们的长子，就是耶和华在他们中间所击杀的；耶和华也败坏他们的神。
chapters.en: For the Egyptians buried all firstborn, which the LORD had smitten among them: upon their gods also the LORD executed judgments.

chapters.zh: 以色列人从兰塞起行，安营在疏割。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel removed from Rameses, and pitched in Succoth.

chapters.zh: 从疏割起行，安营在旷野边的以倘。
chapters.en: And they departed from Succoth, and pitched in Etham, which in the edge of the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 从以倘起行，转到比哈希录，是在巴力洗分对面，就在密夺安营。
chapters.en: And they removed from Etham, and turned again unto Pihahiroth, which before Baalzephon: and they pitched before Migdol.

chapters.zh: 从比哈希录对面起行，经过海中到了书珥旷野，又在伊坦的旷野走了三天的路程，就安营在玛拉。
chapters.en: And they departed from before Pihahiroth, and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness, and went three days' journey in the wilderness of Etham, and pitched in Marah.

chapters.zh: 从玛拉起行，来到以琳（以琳有十二股水泉，七十棵棕树），就在那里安营。
chapters.en: And they removed from Marah, and came unto Elim: and in Elim twelve fountains of water, and threescore and ten palm trees; and they pitched there.

chapters.zh: 从以琳起行，安营在红海边。
chapters.en: And they removed from Elim, and encamped by the Red sea.

chapters.zh: 从红海边起行，安营在汛的旷野。
chapters.en: And they removed from the Red sea, and encamped in the wilderness of Sin.

chapters.zh: 从汛的旷野起行，安营在脱加。
chapters.en: And they took their journey out of the wilderness of Sin, and encamped in Dophkah.

chapters.zh: 从脱加起行，安营在亚录。
chapters.en: And they departed from Dophkah, and encamped in Alush.

chapters.zh: 从亚录起行，安营在利非订；在那里，百姓没有水喝。
chapters.en: And they removed from Alush, and encamped at Rephidim, where was no water for the people to drink.

chapters.zh: 从利非订起行，安营在西乃的旷野。
chapters.en: And they departed from Rephidim, and pitched in the wilderness of Sinai.

chapters.zh: 从西乃的旷野起行，安营在基博罗哈他瓦。
chapters.en: And they removed from the desert of Sinai, and pitched at Kibrothhattaavah.

chapters.zh: 从基博罗哈他瓦起行，安营在哈洗录。
chapters.en: And they departed from Kibrothhattaavah, and encamped at Hazeroth.

chapters.zh: 从哈洗录起行，安营在利提玛。
chapters.en: And they departed from Hazeroth, and pitched in Rithmah.

chapters.zh: 从利提玛起行，安营在临门帕烈。
chapters.en: And they departed from Rithmah, and pitched at Rimmonparez.

chapters.zh: 从临门帕烈起行，安营在立拿。
chapters.en: And they departed from Rimmonparez, and pitched in Libnah.

chapters.zh: 从立拿起行，安营在勒撒。
chapters.en: And they removed from Libnah, and pitched at Rissah.

chapters.zh: 从勒撒起行，安营在基希拉他。
chapters.en: And they journeyed from Rissah, and pitched in Kehelathah.

chapters.zh: 从基希拉他起行，安营在沙斐山。
chapters.en: And they went from Kehelathah, and pitched in mount Shapher.

chapters.zh: 从沙斐山起行，安营在哈拉大。
chapters.en: And they removed from mount Shapher, and encamped in Haradah.

chapters.zh: 从哈拉大起行，安营在玛吉希录。
chapters.en: And they removed from Haradah, and pitched in Makheloth.

chapters.zh: 从玛吉希录起行，安营在他哈。
chapters.en: And they removed from Makheloth, and encamped at Tahath.

chapters.zh: 从他哈起行，安营在他拉。
chapters.en: And they departed from Tahath, and pitched at Tarah.

chapters.zh: 从他拉起行，安营在密加。
chapters.en: And they removed from Tarah, and pitched in Mithcah.

chapters.zh: 从密加起行，安营在哈摩拿。
chapters.en: And they went from Mithcah, and pitched in Hashmonah.

chapters.zh: 从哈摩拿起行，安营在摩西录。
chapters.en: And they departed from Hashmonah, and encamped at Moseroth.

chapters.zh: 从摩西录起行，安营在比尼亚干。
chapters.en: And they departed from Moseroth, and pitched in Benejaakan.

chapters.zh: 从比尼亚干起行，安营在曷哈及甲。
chapters.en: And they removed from Benejaakan, and encamped at Horhagidgad.

chapters.zh: 从曷哈及甲起行，安营在约巴他。
chapters.en: And they went from Horhagidgad, and pitched in Jotbathah.

chapters.zh: 从约巴他起行，安营在阿博拿。
chapters.en: And they removed from Jotbathah, and encamped at Ebronah.

chapters.zh: 从阿博拿起行，安营在以旬迦别。
chapters.en: And they departed from Ebronah, and encamped at Eziongaber.

chapters.zh: 从以旬迦别起行，安营在寻的旷野，就是加低斯。
chapters.en: And they removed from Eziongaber, and pitched in the wilderness of Zin, which Kadesh.

chapters.zh: 从加低斯起行，安营在何珥山，以东地的边界。
chapters.en: And they removed from Kadesh, and pitched in mount Hor, in the edge of the land of Edom.

chapters.zh: 以色列人出了埃及地后四十年，五月初一日，祭司亚伦遵著耶和华的吩咐上何珥山，就死在那里。
chapters.en: And Aaron the priest went up into mount Hor at the commandment of the LORD, and died there, in the fortieth year after the children of Israel were come out of the land of Egypt, in the first of the fifth month.

chapters.zh: 亚伦死在何珥山的时候年一百二十三岁。
chapters.en: And Aaron an hundred and twenty and three years old when he died in mount Hor.

chapters.zh: 住在迦南南地的迦南人亚拉得王听说以色列人来了。
chapters.en: And king Arad the Canaanite, which dwelt in the south in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 以色列人从何珥山起行，安营在撒摩拿。
chapters.en: And they departed from mount Hor, and pitched in Zalmonah.

chapters.zh: 从撒摩拿起行，安营在普嫩。
chapters.en: And they departed from Zalmonah, and pitched in Punon.

chapters.zh: 从普嫩起行，安营在阿伯。
chapters.en: And they departed from Punon, and pitched in Oboth.

chapters.zh: 从阿伯起行，安营在以耶亚巴琳，摩押的边界。
chapters.en: And they departed from Oboth, and pitched in Ijeabarim, in the border of Moab.

chapters.zh: 从以耶亚巴琳起行，安营在底本迦得。
chapters.en: And they departed from Iim, and pitched in Dibongad.

chapters.zh: 从底本迦得起行，安营在亚门低比拉太音。
chapters.en: And they removed from Dibongad, and encamped in Almondiblathaim.

chapters.zh: 从亚门低比拉太音起行，安营在尼波对面的亚巴琳山里。
chapters.en: And they removed from Almondiblathaim, and pitched in the mountains of Abarim, before Nebo.

chapters.zh: 从亚巴琳山起行，安营在摩押平原 ─ 约但河边、耶利哥对面。
chapters.en: And they departed from the mountains of Abarim, and pitched in the plains of Moab by Jordan Jericho.

chapters.zh: 他们在摩押平原沿约但河边安营，从伯耶施末直到亚伯什亭。
chapters.en: And they pitched by Jordan, from Bethjesimoth unto Abelshittim in the plains of Moab.

chapters.zh: 耶和华在摩押平原 ─ 约但河边、耶利哥对面晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by Jordan Jericho, saying,

chapters.zh: 你吩咐以色列人说：你们过约但河进迦南地的时候，
chapters.en: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye are passed over Jordan into the land of Canaan;

chapters.zh: 就要从你们面前赶出那里所有的居民，毁灭他们一切錾成的石像和他们一切铸成的偶像，又拆毁他们一切的邱坛。
chapters.en: Then ye shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and destroy all their pictures, and destroy all their molten images, and quite pluck down all their high places:

chapters.zh: 你们要夺那地，住在其中，因我把那地赐给你们为业。
chapters.en: And ye shall dispossess of the land, and dwell therein: for I have given you the land to possess it.

chapters.zh: 你们要按家室拈阄，承受那地；人多的，要把产业多分给他们；人少的，要把产业少分给他们。拈出何地给何人，就要归何人。你们要按宗族的支派承受。
chapters.en: And ye shall divide the land by lot for an inheritance among your families: to the more ye shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer ye shall give the less inheritance: every man's shall be in the place where his lot falleth; according to the tribes of your fathers ye shall inherit.

chapters.zh: 倘若你们不赶出那地的居民，所容留的居民就必作你们眼中的刺，肋下的荆棘，也必在你们所住的地上扰害你们。
chapters.en: But if ye will not drive out the inhabitants of the land from before you; then it shall come to pass, that those which ye let remain of them pricks in your eyes, and thorns in your sides, and shall vex you in the land wherein ye dwell.

chapters.zh: 而且我素常有意怎样待他们，也必照样待你们。
chapters.en: Moreover it shall come to pass, I shall do unto you, as I thought to do unto them.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 你吩咐以色列人说：你们到了迦南地，就是归你们为业的迦南四境之地，
chapters.en: Command the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye come into the land of Canaan; (this the land that shall fall unto you for an inheritance, the land of Canaan with the coasts thereof:)

chapters.zh: 南角要从寻的旷野，贴著以东的边界；南界要从盐海东头起，
chapters.en: Then your south quarter shall be from the wilderness of Zin along by the coast of Edom, and your south border shall be the outmost coast of the salt sea eastward:

chapters.zh: 绕到亚克拉滨坡的南边，接连到寻，直通到加低斯巴尼亚的南边，又通到哈萨亚达，接连到押们，
chapters.en: And your border shall turn from the south to the ascent of Akrabbim, and pass on to Zin: and the going forth thereof shall be from the south to Kadeshbarnea, and shall go on to Hazaraddar, and pass on to Azmon:

chapters.zh: 从押们转到埃及小河，直通到海为止。
chapters.en: And the border shall fetch a compass from Azmon unto the river of Egypt, and the goings out of it shall be at the sea.

chapters.zh: 西边要以大海为界；这就是你们的西界。
chapters.en: And the western border, ye shall even have the great sea for a border: this shall be your west border.

chapters.zh: 北界要从大海起，画到何珥山，
chapters.en: And this shall be your north border: from the great sea ye shall point out for you mount Hor:

chapters.zh: 从何珥山划到哈马口，通到西达达，
chapters.en: From mount Hor ye shall point out unto the entrance of Hamath; and the goings forth of the border shall be to Zedad:

chapters.zh: 又通到西斐仑，直到哈萨以难。这要作你们的北界。
chapters.en: And the border shall go on to Ziphron, and the goings out of it shall be at Hazarenan: this shall be your north border.

chapters.zh: 你们要从哈萨以难划到示番为东界。
chapters.en: And ye shall point out your east border from Hazarenan to Shepham:

chapters.zh: 这界要从示番下到亚延东边的利比拉，又要达到基尼烈湖的东边。
chapters.en: And the coast shall go down from Shepham to Riblah, on the east side of Ain; and the border shall descend, and shall reach unto the side of the sea of Chinnereth eastward:

chapters.zh: 这界要下到约但河，通到盐海为止。这四围的边界以内，要作你们的地。
chapters.en: And the border shall go down to Jordan, and the goings out of it shall be at the salt sea: this shall be your land with the coasts thereof round about.

chapters.zh: 摩西吩咐以色列人说：这地就是耶和华吩咐拈阄给九个半支派承受为业的；
chapters.en: And Moses commanded the children of Israel, saying, This the land which ye shall inherit by lot, which the LORD commanded to give unto the nine tribes, and to the half tribe:

chapters.zh: 因为流便支派和迦得支派按著宗族受了产业，玛拿西半个支派也受了产业。
chapters.en: For the tribe of the children of Reuben according to the house of their fathers, and the tribe of the children of Gad according to the house of their fathers, have received ; and half the tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance:

chapters.zh: 这两个半支派已经在耶利哥对面、约但河东、向日出之地受了产业。
chapters.en: The two tribes and the half tribe have received their inheritance on this side Jordan Jericho eastward, toward the sunrising.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 要给你们分地为业之人的名字是祭司以利亚撒和嫩的儿子约书亚。
chapters.en: These the names of the men which shall divide the land unto you: Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun.

chapters.zh: 又要从每支派中选一个首领帮助他们。
chapters.en: And ye shall take one prince of every tribe, to divide the land by inheritance.

chapters.zh: 这些人的名字：犹大支派有耶孚尼的儿子迦勒。
chapters.en: And the names of the men these: Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

chapters.zh: 西缅支派有亚米忽的儿子示母利。
chapters.en: And of the tribe of the children of Simeon, Shemuel the son of Ammihud.

chapters.zh: 便雅悯支派有基斯伦的儿子以利达。
chapters.en: Of the tribe of Benjamin, Elidad the son of Chislon.

chapters.zh: 但支派有一个首领，约利的儿子布基。
chapters.en: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Dan, Bukki the son of Jogli.

chapters.zh: 约瑟的子孙玛拿西支派有一个首领，以弗的儿子汉聂。
chapters.en: The prince of the children of Joseph, for the tribe of the children of Manasseh, Hanniel the son of Ephod.

chapters.zh: 以法莲支派有一个首领，拾弗但的儿子基母利。
chapters.en: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Ephraim, Kemuel the son of Shiphtan.

chapters.zh: 西布伦支派有一个首领，帕纳的儿子以利撒番。
chapters.en: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Zebulun, Elizaphan the son of Parnach.

chapters.zh: 以萨迦支派有一个首领，阿散的儿子帕铁。
chapters.en: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Issachar, Paltiel the son of Azzan.

chapters.zh: 亚设支派有一个首领，示罗米的儿子亚希忽。
chapters.en: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Asher, Ahihud the son of Shelomi.

chapters.zh: 拿弗他利支派有一个首领，亚米忽的儿子比大黑。
chapters.en: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Naphtali, Pedahel the son of Ammihud.

chapters.zh: 这些人就是耶和华所吩咐、在迦南地把产业分给以色列人的。
chapters.en: These whom the LORD commanded to divide the inheritance unto the children of Israel in the land of Canaan.

chapters.zh: 耶和华在摩押平原 ─ 约但河边、耶利哥对面晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by Jordan Jericho, saying,

chapters.zh: 你吩咐以色列人，要从所得为业的地中把些城给利未人居住，也要把这城四围的郊野给利未人。
chapters.en: Command the children of Israel, that they give unto the Levites of the inheritance of their possession cities to dwell in; and ye shall give unto the Levites suburbs for the cities round about them.

chapters.zh: 这城邑要归他们居住，城邑的郊野可以牧养他们的牛羊和各样的牲畜，又可以安置他们的财物。
chapters.en: And the cities shall they have to dwell in; and the suburbs of them shall be for their cattle, and for their goods, and for all their beasts.

chapters.zh: 你们给利未人的郊野，要从城根起，四围往外量一千肘。
chapters.en: And the suburbs of the cities, which ye shall give unto the Levites, from the wall of the city and outward a thousand cubits round about.

chapters.zh: 另外东量二千肘，南量二千肘，西量二千肘，北量二千肘，为边界，城在当中；这要归他们作城邑的郊野。
chapters.en: And ye shall measure from without the city on the east side two thousand cubits, and on the south side two thousand cubits, and on the west side two thousand cubits, and on the north side two thousand cubits; and the city in the midst: this shall be to them the suburbs of the cities.

chapters.zh: 你们给利未人的城邑，其中当有六座逃城，使误杀人的可以逃到那里。此外还要给他们四十二座城。
chapters.en: And among the cities which ye shall give unto the Levites six cities for refuge, which ye shall appoint for the manslayer, that he may flee thither: and to them ye shall add forty and two cities.

chapters.zh: 你们要给利未人的城，共有四十八座，连城带郊野都要给他们。
chapters.en: all the cities which ye shall give to the Levites forty and eight cities: them with their suburbs.

chapters.zh: 以色列人所得的地业从中要把些城邑给利未人；人多的就多给，人少的就少给；各支派要按所承受为业之地把城邑给利未人。
chapters.en: And the cities which ye shall give of the possession of the children of Israel: from many ye shall give many; but from few ye shall give few: every one shall give of his cities unto the Levites according to his inheritance which he inheriteth.

chapters.zh: 耶和华晓谕摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

chapters.zh: 你吩咐以色列人说：你们过约但河，进了迦南地，
chapters.en: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye be come over Jordan into the land of Canaan;

chapters.zh: 就要分出几座城，为你们作逃城，使误杀人的可以逃到那里。
chapters.en: Then ye shall appoint you cities to be cities of refuge for you; that the slayer may flee thither, which killeth any person at unawares.

chapters.zh: 这些城可以作逃避报仇人的城，使误杀人的不至于死，等他站在会众面前听审判。
chapters.en: And they shall be unto you cities for refuge from the avenger; that the manslayer die not, until he stand before the congregation in judgment.

chapters.zh: 你们所分出来的城，要作六座逃城。
chapters.en: And of these cities which ye shall give six cities shall ye have for refuge.

chapters.zh: 在约但河东要分出三座城，在迦南地也要分出三座城，都作逃城。
chapters.en: Ye shall give three cities on this side Jordan, and three cities shall ye give in the land of Canaan, shall be cities of refuge.

chapters.zh: 这六座城要给以色列人和他们中间的外人，并寄居的，作为逃城，使误杀人的都可以逃到那里。
chapters.en: These six cities shall be a refuge, for the children of Israel, and for the stranger, and for the sojourner among them: that every one that killeth any person unawares may flee thither.

chapters.zh: 倘若人用铁器打人，以致打死，他就是故杀人的；故杀人的必被治死。
chapters.en: And if he smite him with an instrument of iron, so that he die, he a murderer: the murderer shall surely be put to death.

chapters.zh: 若用可以打死人的石头打死了人，他就是故杀人的；故杀人的必被治死。
